assertions.title: SystemPromptBuilder discovers instruction files from workspace root

evidence.testDetails: Creates temp directory with CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md, verifies discover_instruction_files() finds both files and reads their content
Builds system prompt and asserts it contains DYNAMIC_BOUNDARY marker between static and dynamic sections
Verifies deterministic ordering: static sections before DYNAMIC_BOUNDARY, task context after DYNAMIC_BOUNDARY, and two builds with same input produce identical output
Uses actual repository path, verifies get_git_snapshot() returns branch or commits info

summary: Tested 4 assertions (VAL-PROMPT-001 to VAL-PROMPT-004): all 4 passed. Tests verify SystemPromptBuilder discovers instruction files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md), inserts DYNAMIC_BOUNDARY marker, provides deterministic section ordering with static content before dynamic, and includes git snapshot (branch and commits) in project context.
